name: default
description: The built-in engineering pipeline expressed as editable stages: triage → execute → verify. PR-opening and notify still run automatically (driven by pr_title_template + a configured git host). NOTE: custom stages bypass the confirm_repo / approve_plan approval gates — set auto_approve or re-add gates via a future stage type. Edit the prompts/tasks below to tune behavior.

stages.name: triage
verify
stages.task: Verify the implementation for ticket {{.Key}} ({{.Title}}) is correct. List any defects via finish.
